metadata.description: The complete Claude Code toolkit for web & advertising design agencies

plugins.name: agency-core
plugins.description: Agency project workflow: BRIEF → CONCEPT → DESIGN → BUILD → QA → LAUNCH router, project scaffolding, handoffs and proposals.

plugins.name: design-foundation
plugins.description: Design quality layer: UI/UX excellence, taste, style systems, interface polish and design review for premium web design.

plugins.name: motion-3d
plugins.description: Motion & 3D: GSAP animation suite, Three.js/WebGL, React Three Fiber, Lottie, Rive and Remotion video.

plugins.name: quality-qa
plugins.description: Quality assurance: performance, Core Web Vitals, accessibility, web best practices, webapp testing and pre-launch checklists.

plugins.name: seo-marketing
plugins.description: SEO & search marketing: audits, technical SEO, content, schema, local SEO, AI visibility (GEO) and competitor analysis.

plugins.name: ad-creative
plugins.description: Advertising creative: campaign ideation, ad copywriting, social format specs, landing page CRO, brand kits and image generation direction.
